skills.name: PostgreSQL RLS Security Setup

skills.name: CONTRACT_DRAFT 8-Section Template

skills.name: Multi-Tenant Schema Design Pattern Catalog
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Comprehensive patterns for multi-tenant SaaS database schemas: standard entities, time-series partitioning, hierarchical tenancy, shared reference data, soft delete cascade. Includes index strategy, N+1 prevention, and GDPR compliance.

skills.name: Architecture Challenge Response Protocol
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Nash Triad response workflow for Phúc SA when Mộc challenges architecture. Defines protocol for ARCH_RESPONSE.md with evidence-based decisions, Phanbien workflow for contested HIGH issues, and PEN-001 violation prevention.

skills.name: Token-Optimized Architecture Documentation
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Create ARCHITECTURE_ABSTRACT.md (~150 lines) to complement full ARCHITECTURE.md. Implements WIN-001 pattern with 85%+ token reduction via tables, bullets, acronyms, and file references. Enables fast gate reviews.

skills.name: Architecture Decision Framework
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: CTO-level decision framework with trade-off analysis. Decision trees for Monolith vs Microservices, Sync vs Async, SQL vs NoSQL. Includes ADR template and anti-pattern warnings.

skills.name: Module Decomposition Strategy
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Break complex systems into manageable modules. 3 approaches: Vertical (domain), Horizontal (layer), Hybrid (feature). Includes naming anti-patterns, dependency rules, and refactoring guides.

skills.name: Design Pattern Selection
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Tactical design patterns with selection criteria and progression path. Covers Transaction Script, DDD, Repository, CQRS, Event Sourcing, Clean Architecture. Includes pattern progression guide (Year 1→4) and anti-pattern warnings.

skills.name: React 18 + Vite Best Practices
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Type-safe React patterns with TanStack Query, Zustand, and STMAI API envelope integration. Includes patterns for data fetching, state management, error boundaries, XSS prevention, and component size limits.

skills.name: TDD Best Practices
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Test-Driven Development patterns for RED → GREEN → REFACTOR cycles. Includes unit and integration test patterns for TypeScript/Jest and Go/Testing with coverage targets (Unit ≥80%, Integration ≥70%).

skills.name: API Chaos Testing
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Systematic chaos testing for APIs, auth, RLS, and edge cases. Includes payload chaos (empty, 10MB, malformed), auth bypass testing, SQL injection detection, and severity classification (BLOCKER/CRITICAL/MAJOR/MINOR).

skills.name: Data Flow Tracing
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: End-to-end data flow verification for code reviews (DB → API → State → UI). Prevents PEN-001 violations by ensuring ALL consumers are updated when persistence changes. Includes trace checklists and review scripts.

skills.name: UX Audit Checklist
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Structured UX audit for Visual Hierarchy, Visual Style, and Accessibility. Includes 6 audit pillars (3 core + 3 contextual), WCAG AA compliance checks (contrast ≥4.5:1), and audit report template.

skills.name: Frontend Security Coder
skills.author: Antigravity (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: Expert frontend security coding. XSS prevention, CSP configuration, DOMPurify integration, secure DOM manipulation, Content Security Policy implementation, and safe user interaction patterns.

skills.name: React Best Practices (Vercel)
skills.author: Vercel Engineering (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: Vercel's 45 performance optimization rules for React and Next.js. Covers waterfalls, bundle size, re-renders, server-side performance, and advanced patterns. Prioritized by impact (CRITICAL → LOW).

skills.name: Systematic Debugging
skills.author: Antigravity (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: 4-phase root cause investigation protocol (Root Cause → Pattern Analysis → Hypothesis → Implementation). Includes multi-layer diagnosis, backward tracing, and architectural questioning after 3+ failed fixes. Prevents random fixes and symptom masking.

skills.name: E2E Testing Workflow
skills.author: Antigravity (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: End-to-end testing workflow with Playwright for browser automation, visual regression, cross-browser testing, and CI/CD integration. Covers test setup, design, implementation, and quality gates.

skills.name: API Security Testing Workflow
skills.author: Antigravity (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: API security testing workflow for REST and GraphQL APIs covering authentication, authorization, rate limiting, input validation, and security best practices. Includes IDOR testing, JWT manipulation, and GraphQL-specific attacks.

skills.name: Testing Patterns and Utilities
skills.author: Antigravity (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: Jest testing patterns, factory functions, mocking strategies, and TDD workflow. Includes custom render functions, component props factories, data factories, and anti-patterns to avoid.

skills.name: Testing/QA Workflow Bundle
skills.author: Antigravity (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: Comprehensive testing and quality assurance workflow covering unit testing, integration testing, E2E testing, browser automation, and quality assurance. Includes 8-phase workflow from test strategy to quality gates.

skills.name: Test Automation Excellence
skills.author: Antigravity (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: Master AI-powered test automation with modern frameworks, self-healing tests, and comprehensive quality engineering. Build scalable testing strategies with advanced CI/CD integration, TDD excellence, and quality metrics.

skills.name: Manual Tester (L3 Worker)
skills.author: Claude Code Skills (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: Performs manual testing of Story AC via executable bash scripts saved to tests/manual/. Creates reusable test suites per Story with fail-fast principles, expected/ golden files, and test harness integration.

skills.name: Test Suite Auditor (L2 Coordinator)
skills.author: Claude Code Skills (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: Coordinates comprehensive test suite audit across 8 quality categories using 7 specialized workers. Discovers both automated and manual tests, calculates Usefulness Score, identifies missing tests for critical business logic, and detects anti-patterns.

skills.name: Business Logic Focus Auditor (L3 Worker)
skills.author: Claude Code Skills (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: Detects tests that validate framework/library behavior (Prisma, Express, bcrypt, JWT, axios, React hooks) instead of OUR code. Returns findings with REMOVE decisions for framework tests.

skills.name: Risk-Based Value Auditor (L3 Worker)
skills.author: Claude Code Skills (migrated to Nash)
skills.description: Calculates Usefulness Score = Impact (1-5) × Probability (1-5) for each test. Returns KEEP/REVIEW/REMOVE decisions based on thresholds (≥15 KEEP, 10-14 REVIEW, <10 REMOVE).

skills.name: FastAPI Async Patterns & Best Practices
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Production-ready FastAPI patterns with async/await, dependency injection, Pydantic validation, and STMAI API envelope integration. Prevents event loop blocking, enforces type safety, and implements BaseResponse envelope pattern.

skills.name: SQLAlchemy Async Patterns & Multi-Tenancy
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Production-ready SQLAlchemy 2.0 async patterns with multi-tenant isolation, eager loading, and N+1 prevention. Enforces tenant_id filtering, soft deletes, UTC timestamps, and AsyncSession best practices.

skills.name: Pytest FastAPI Testing Patterns
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: TDD patterns for FastAPI with pytest, pytest-asyncio, async fixtures, and coverage targets (≥80%). Implements RED→GREEN→REFACTOR cycle, tenant isolation testing, and prevents hollow tests.

skills.name: Performance & Load Testing
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v1.0)
skills.description: Load testing with k6/Gatling for production readiness validation. Simulates Black Friday traffic with TWO_PASS workflow (CRITICAL: DB pool exhausted, OOM, error rate >1% blocks deploy; INFORMATIONAL: N+1 queries, cache misses documented). Includes ramp-up, spike, soak test patterns, multi-tenant isolation testing, performance budgets (P95 <500ms), CI/CD integration, and bottleneck analysis with real production bug examples.

skills.name: Requirements Engineering
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v2.0)
skills.description: Systematic requirements elicitation with SMART criteria, acceptance tests, MoSCoW prioritization. Two-pass workflow (CRITICAL: missing acceptance criteria, vague constraints → INFORMATIONAL: UX polish). Includes 5 elicitation techniques (5 Whys, prototyping, workshops, observation, BDD), production bug prevention table, NFR templates, and scope creep detection. Transforms vague requests ('fast', 'secure') into testable metrics (p95 < 500ms, RLS enforced).

skills.name: Database Migration (GSTACK v2.0)
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v2.0)
skills.description: Zero-downtime schema migrations with Expand-Contract pattern, rollback plans, and multi-tenant RLS safety. GSTACK-compliant with Philosophy (surgeon on beating heart), 7 Prime Directives, Migration Strategies table, Rollback Decision Matrix, Pre-Migration Checklist, and Real Production Disaster example. Two-pass review (CRITICAL: data safety → INFORMATIONAL: performance). Prevents P0 violations: missing backups, no lock timeout, missing RLS policies.

skills.name: Test Data Management
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v2.0)
skills.description: Hermetic test data factories with multi-tenant isolation and deterministic faker seeding. GSTACK-compliant with Philosophy (data gardener), 7 Prime Directives, Data Generation Strategies table, 3 Cleanup Strategies, Multi-Tenant Isolation patterns (PEN-003 prevention), Two-Pass workflow (CRITICAL: tenant pollution, non-deterministic data → INFORMATIONAL: data realism), and Stopping Policy (setup > 30% runtime → refactor). Prevents flaky tests from shared tenants, hardcoded IDs, and missing cleanup. Includes factory patterns for TS/Prisma, Python/SQLAlchemy, fixtures, seeders, anonymization (GDPR), and Testcontainers.

skills.name: Secrets & Config Management
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v2.0)
skills.description: Security-first secrets management with AWS Secrets Manager, rotation, and leak prevention. Two-pass workflow (CRITICAL: hardcoded secrets, secrets in logs/git → INFORMATIONAL: rotation frequency, caching). Enforces vault keeper axiom: 'If it's sensitive, it's in a vault. If it's in code or logs, it's a P0 incident.' Includes pre-commit hooks, truffleHog SAST, Lambda auto-rotation (90-day DB passwords), log redaction (Pino), multi-tenant isolation, and incident response runbook. Real breach examples: GitHub AWS key → $47K bill. Prevents P0 violations with gates/security.sh.

skills.name: Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/Pulumi)
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Security-first IaC with Terraform/Pulumi. Two-pass review (CRITICAL: state/secrets/IAM → INFORMATIONAL: optimization). Enforces remote state, state locking, secrets in Vault/Secrets Manager, module design, input validation, CI/CD integration with plan artifacts. Prevents hardcoded secrets (P0), missing encryption (P1), and IAM wildcard permissions (P1).

skills.name: Container Orchestration (Kubernetes & Docker)
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v2.0)
skills.description: Security-first container & Kubernetes engineering. Multi-stage builds, resource limits, Pod Security Standards, HPA, Helm charts. Two-pass audit (CRITICAL: security/resources → INFORMATIONAL: optimization). Enforces non-root users, readOnlyRootFilesystem, no :latest tags, health checks mandatory. Includes production-grade Deployment templates and real bug examples.

skills.name: Observability & Monitoring
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v1.0)
skills.description: Enterprise observability stack with Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Loki. Implements Golden Signals (Latency, Traffic, Errors, Saturation), SLO-based alerting, distributed tracing with trace propagation (API → Kafka → Worker), and structured JSON logging. Two-pass workflow: CRITICAL alerts (error rate, latency, lag, health) block deploy; INFORMATIONAL dashboards for debugging. Every alert requires runbook URL. Multi-tenant isolation via tenant_id labels.

skills.name: Regression Test Suite Management
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v2.0)
skills.description: Regression test management with risk-based selection, flaky test detection, and test retirement strategies. Every production bug becomes a regression test. Implements 3 test selection strategies (risk-based, change-based, priority-based), flaky test quarantine (< 2% flaky rate), and test lifecycle management. Two-pass workflow: CRITICAL (flaky rate > 5%, missing critical path tests, suite timeout > 30 min) blocks deploy; INFORMATIONAL (duration optimization, snapshot updates) documented for future work. Includes 5 flaky test root cause categories with fix strategies and real production bug examples.

skills.name: High-Level Design (HLD)
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v2.0)
skills.description: System architecture design with C4 model, ADRs, and scalability patterns. GSTACK-compliant with Philosophy (city architect for 10M inhabitants), 7 Prime Directives (C4 model, ADRs with evidence, SPOF mitigation, scalability, NFRs, 3-stakeholder review, anti-patterns), Design Patterns table (3-Tier, Microservices, Event-Driven, CQRS, Serverless, BFF), Multi-Path Design (Requirements → Context → Containers → Components → ADR), TWO_PASS workflow (CRITICAL: scalability/SPOF/NFRs/ADRs → INFORMATIONAL: aesthetics/naming), Escape Hatches (skip if <3 components), and Real Production Failures ($50K Black Friday outage, $200K database migration, 20% churn from missing NFRs). Requires C1/C2/C3 diagrams, ≥3 ADRs, NFRs (P95 <500ms, 99.9% uptime, RLS enforced), and SPOF mitigation plan.

skills.name: Technical Debt Management
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v1.0)
skills.description: Technical debt tracking with compound interest calculation (P0=10%/day, P1=5%/day, P2=2%/day) and repayment strategies. Every TODO is a loan with exponential compounding—a 2-day P0 fix becomes 34 days after 30 days. Implements 5-phase lifecycle (Incur → Track → Prioritize → Repay → Prevent), debt severity matrix (P0-P4 with max age and SLAs), two-pass workflow (CRITICAL: P0 > 14 days, coverage < 70%, TODO without ticket blocks deploy; INFORMATIONAL: P2/P3 debt documented), stopping policy (> 100 items = freeze features), pre-commit hooks (no TODO without ticket ID), and debt ceiling checks. Includes 5 debt types (Code, Architecture, Test, Documentation, Infrastructure), automated extraction scripts, and 3 real production disasters with interest calculations.

skills.name: Git Workflow & Branching
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v2.0)
skills.description: Version control architect skill for maintaining sacred git history—clean, deployable, and auditable. GSTACK v2.0 compliant with Philosophy (3 mental models: CRITICAL/INFORMATIONAL/COLLABORATION), 7 Prime Directives, Two-Pass review workflow, Branching Strategies table (Trunk-Based, GitHub Flow, GitFlow, Feature Branches), 7-phase Branch Lifecycle, Conventional Commits Types table, Merge Strategies decision matrix, GitFlow workflow for releases, Pre-Push Checklist, Meta-Instructions with Stopping Policy, and Real Production Bugs table. Prevents P0 violations: force push to main (24 engineer-hours recovery), secrets committed ($47K AWS bill), merge conflicts ignored (2-hour outage). Primary use: Hưng (DevOps) for release tagging and deployment workflows, all dev agents for daily commit/branching.

skills.name: Project Planning & Estimation
skills.author: Nash Framework (GSTACK v2.0)
skills.description: Chess grandmaster planning 10 moves ahead. Agile planning with story points, dependency mapping, PERT estimation, and risk-adjusted buffers. Implements Fibonacci story points (1-13), 2x multiplier for unknowns, dependency mapping with critical path analysis, and buffer allocation (20% known risks, 50% unknowns). Two-pass workflow: CRITICAL (missing dependencies, no estimates, unclear criteria, no buffer) blocks sprint start; INFORMATIONAL (velocity tracking, retrospectives) improves accuracy. Includes real production disaster examples (MongoDB → PostgreSQL migration: 2 weeks → 8 weeks overrun) and stopping policies (story > 13 points = break down, 3+ re-estimates = spike task).
